name: reschedule_event
description: Moves an existing calendar event to a new time slot by updating its start and end times. Can optionally notify attendees with a custom message explaining the change.

event_id.description: The unique identifier of the calendar event to reschedule.
event_id.$comment: Opaque string to support multiple calendar backend implementations.

new_start_time.description: The new start date and time of the event in ISO 8601 format.
new_start_time.$comment: ISO 8601 format ensures timezone-portable and unambiguous datetime representation.

new_end_time.description: The new end date and time of the event in ISO 8601 format. Must be after new_start_time.
new_end_time.$comment: Always required to prevent ambiguous duration interpretation on reschedule.

notify_attendees.description: Whether to send updated invitation emails to all event attendees with the new time.
notify_attendees.$comment: Defaults to true to prevent attendees from showing up at the old time.

message.description: Optional personal message to include in the reschedule notification sent to attendees.
examples: Moved to avoid conflict with the board meeting.
Room change — now in Conference Room A.
Adjusted by 1 hour to accommodate a new participant.
message.$comment: Only sent when notify_attendees is true. Helps attendees understand context without back-and-forth emails.
